Name: Yu the Great, Flood Tamer
Effect: On Enter: Search your deck for a Dam and put it into your hand. If you control a Dam at each location, draw 3 cards.

Name: First Dam (Left)
Effect: On Enter: Put this Dam at the left location. Ongoing: Beings at this location cannot be moved by opponent effects.

Name: Second Dam (Middle)
Effect: On Enter: If you control a Dam at the left location, put this Dam at the middle location. Ongoing: Beings at this location gain +1 Power.

Name: Third Dam (Right)
Effect: On Enter: If you control Dams at the left and middle locations, put this Dam at the right location. Ongoing: Beings at this location cannot be banished by opponent effects.

Name: Xiangliu, the Flood Dragon
Effect: On Enter: If you control fewer than 3 Dams, your opponent must banish a being they control. If you banish Xiangliu, play a Dam from your hand for free.

Name: Gonggong, the Water Fiend
Effect: On Enter: If you control fewer than 3 Dams, your opponent must move a being they control to the graveyard. If you banish Gonggong, draw 2 cards.

Name: Jade Maiden, Spirit of the River
Effect: On Enter: If you control a Dam at this location, draw a card. Ongoing: Beings you control at this location cannot be banished.

Name: Black Tortoise, Earth Guardian
Effect: On Enter: If you control a Dam at this location, put a Dam from your graveyard into your hand. Ongoing: Dams you control cannot be moved.

Name: Flood Worker
Effect: On Enter: If you control a Dam, you may put a Dam from your hand into play at any location. Ongoing: This Human gains +1 Power if you control a Dam.

Name: Dragon Turtle, Floodbeast
Effect: On Enter: If you control fewer than 3 Dams, your opponent must discard a card. If you banish Dragon Turtle, search your deck for a Dam and put it into your hand.

Name: Yu's Laborer
Effect: On Enter: If you control a Dam at this location, draw a card. Ongoing: This Human cannot be banished if you control a Dam at this location.

Name: Flood Spirit
Effect: On Enter: If you control a Dam at this location, move target being to an adjacent location. Ongoing: Beings at this location cannot be moved by opponent effects.

Name: Yu's Steward
Effect: On Enter: Search your deck for a Dam and put it into your hand. Ongoing: If you control 3 Dams, this Human gains +2 Power.

Name: River Serpent
Effect: On Enter: If you control fewer than 3 Dams, your opponent must put a being they control on the bottom of their deck. If you banish River Serpent, play a Human from your hand for free.

Name: Yu's Engineer
Effect: On Enter: If you control a Dam, you may move a Dam you control to any location. Ongoing: This Human cannot be banished if you control 3 Dams.

Name: Flood Guardian
Effect: Ongoing: If you control a Dam at this location, beings you control at this location cannot be banished. On Enter: Draw a card if you control 3 Dams.
